SEARCH
Package me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin

Class ChatPipelineManager

java.lang.Object
me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatPlugin.ChatPipelineManager
public class ChatPipelineManager extends Object
Runtime registry and executor for YoChat's chat pipeline.

This type is primarily used through YoChatAPI, but it is also exposed for integrations that need deeper access to the registered pipeline structure.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep
    Immutable metadata for a single registered pipeline step.

  • Method Details

    • registerStep

      public void registerStep(Stage stage, @NonNull ChatPipelineStep step)
      Registers a step into the given stage using the step's default priority.
      Parameters:
      stage - the pipeline stage
      step - the step to register

    • registerStep

      public void registerStep(Stage stage, @NonNull ChatPipelineStep step, int priority)
      Registers a step into the given stage with an explicit priority.
      Parameters:
      stage - the pipeline stage
      step - the step to register
      priority - the explicit execution priority

    • execute

      public void execute(ChatContext context)

    • execute

      public void execute(Stage stage, ChatContext context)
      Executes a single pipeline stage against the given context.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to execute
      context - the chat context to mutate

    • getSteps

      public List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep> getSteps(Stage stage)
      Returns the registered steps for a single stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to inspect
      Returns:
      an immutable snapshot of registered steps for that stage

    • getRegisteredSteps

      public Map<Stage,List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep>> getRegisteredSteps()
      Returns all registered pipeline steps grouped by stage.
      Returns:
      a snapshot of the internal registration map

    • getPipelineSteps

      public Map<Stage,List<ChatPipelineStep>> getPipelineSteps()
      Returns only the raw step implementations grouped by stage.
      Returns:
      a snapshot of registered step implementations

    • clearSteps

      public void clearSteps(Stage stage)
      Removes every step from the given stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to clear

    • clearAllSteps

      public void clearAllSteps()
      Removes every registered step from every stage.

    • unregisterStep

      public void unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step)
      Removes the given step instance from every stage where it is registered.
      Parameters:
      step - the step instance to remove

    • unregisterStep

      public void unregisterStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep step)
      Removes the given step instance from a single stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to remove from
      step - the step instance to remove
